g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does the Job Description input contain in the TrotixAI resume tailoring system?')
sendPrompt('What structured resume fields are stored in the PostgreSQL database for TrotixAI?')
sendPrompt('How does the JD Analyzer extract keywords and requirements from a job description?')
sendPrompt('How does the resume normalizer standardize jobseeker data from PostgreSQL for AI processing?')
sendPrompt('What does the JD Insights JSON object look like? What keys does it contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the resume context package contain that gets passed to each LLM prompt?')
sendPrompt('How does the gap analyzer compare JD requirements against the jobseeker resume to find skill gaps?')
sendPrompt('How is the tailoring strategy built from gap analysis output?')
sendPrompt('What prompt is used for the AI summary rewriting in TrotixAI? What constraints apply?')
sendPrompt('How does the skills section get reordered and rewritten for a specific job description?')
sendPrompt('How are experience bullet points rewritten per job entry using the JD context?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI decide which projects and certifications to highlight for a given job?')
sendPrompt('How are AI credits deducted per LLM call in TrotixAI?')
g.text: Credit check before each call · deduct_credits() per LLM call · rollback on failure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does an optimized resume summary look like as output from the LLM?')
sendPrompt('What does the reordered skills output contain?')
sendPrompt('How are bullet points structured in the optimized experience output?')
sendPrompt('Which projects and certifications are selected and why?')
sendPrompt('How does the Resume Aggregator merge outputs from all four parallel LLM calls into one document?')
sendPrompt('What does the validation layer check before the tailored resume is accepted?')
sendPrompt('How does hallucination detection work in the resume validation layer?')
sendPrompt('What is skill consistency validation in the tailored resume pipeline?')
g.text: no skills not in DB profile

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What ATS and format checks are run on the tailored resume?')

sendPrompt('Which Jinja2 templates are available for the tailored resume and how does the user choose one?')
sendPrompt('How is the tailored resume version stored in PostgreSQL alongside the original?')
sendPrompt('How does WeasyPrint generate the PDF from the Jinja2 HTML template?')
